description: Existing Next.js app. User asks to redesign the existing analytics dashboard component to be more expressive. UI-only request.
user_message: Redesign the analytics dashboard at app/(internal)/analytics/page.tsx. The current version is generic and corporate. I want a more distinctive editorial layout with stronger hierarchy, real motion when KPI numbers change, and a clear focal narrative for the top three metrics. Keep accessibility WCAG 2.2 AA. Preserve the current data contract.
notes: UI Design Mode trigger. Should NOT load backend-only rules such as database-design or microservices. Should require a Motion/Palette decision, a conceptual anchor, and design-intent.json.
